# Agent instructions (.claude/)

This repo uses a single source of truth for agent instructions, commands, and skills: the `.agents/` directory. **Before doing anything else, read [`.agents/AGENTS.md`](../.agents/AGENTS.md) and follow its instructions.** That file is the canonical rule set for both Claude Code and GitHub Copilot working in this repo.

- Commands → `.agents/commands/` (also discoverable from this surface as pointer stubs)
- Skills → `.agents/skills/` (also discoverable from this surface as pointer stubs)
- Conventions and context → `context/`

Files in this folder are auto-generated pointer stubs produced by `tools/gather.py`. They exist only so the harness can discover commands and skills natively; the substantive content lives under `.agents/`. Edits made here are overwritten on the next gather.
